message.content:
The Logistic Service page contains the following UI elements and content:  

### 1. Instructional Text (Top Section)  
A light gray background text box with black text:  
*“Select a goods type based on the attributes of your product. For items such as apparel, mugs, furniture, simply select general goods.”*  


### 2. Goods Type Selection Section  
A vertical list of **radio button options** (or selectable items) for goods type, with the first option highlighted:  
- **“General goods”** (first item):  
  - Left side: Text “General goods” in orange, accompanied by a small black circle with a white number “1” (likely an indicator of selection status or count).  
  - Right side: A checked orange checkbox (✓) next to the text “General goods” (confirming this option is selected).  
- Subsequent options (unselected, gray text):  
  - “Batteries”  
  - “Magnetic goods”  
  - “Powders”  
  - “Liquids”  
  - “Special goods”  


### 3. Action Buttons (Bottom of Selection Section)  
Two buttons aligned horizontally:  
- **“Clear all”**: Plain text button (black text, no background color, likely a secondary action).  
- **“Confirm”**: Orange background button with white text (primary action button).  


### 4. Explanatory Text (Below Buttons)  
Black text on a white background:  
*“If the Buyer search for any request means he will get the details like this”*  


### Overall Layout & Style  
- The page uses a clean, minimalistic design with a white background.  
- The goods type selection area is contained in a light gray box, separating it from the rest of the content.  
- Buttons are styled for clear visual hierarchy (orange for primary action, plain text for secondary).  
- Text is legible, with the selected “General goods” option distinguished by orange text and a checked checkbox.
